title: Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services!
